OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchShiftAndFacilityTitleClinician

omniProcessElements.name: RA_SendFetchedData
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "useFormulas" : true, "additionalOutput" : { "propMapType" : { "required" : false, "fieldName" : "Type", "options" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(%LA_ReturnOptions%),LIST(%LA_ReturnOptions%),LIST())", "label" : "Type", "componentName" : "Type", "stepName" : "STP_SelectShiftFacilityTitle" } }, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { }, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

childElements.name: DR_GetHPFandClinicianDetails
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "facilityId" : "%facilityId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRGetHPFandClinicianDetails", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_GetCodeSets
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "CodeSetType" : "%type%", "isActive" : true, "EmploymentType" : "%DR_GetHPFandClinicianDetails:recHPF:Employment_Type__c%" }, "additionalOutput" : { "type" : "=FILTER(LIST(DRE_GetCodeSets:CodeSetRecs), 'CodeSetType == \"' + type + '\"')" }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "FetchedCodeSets", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREGetCodeSetsClone", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "isActive" : true, "disOnTplt" : false, "id" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

childElements.name: LA_NewGradBonus
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(FetchedCodeSets) && (DR_GetHPFandClinicianDetails:recHPF|1:Practitioner:Professional_Title__c=='NP' || DR_GetHPFandClinicianDetails:recHPF|1:Practitioner:Professional_Title__c=='PA')", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : false, "advancedMergeMap" : [ ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "FetchedCodeSets:type" ], "filterListFormula" : "Name=='New Grad Bonus'", "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }
